items.title: Robust Secret Rotation Script Template
items.description: A cross-platform PowerShell script to verify, rotate, and log API key rotations securely with automatic rollback on error.

items.title: Directory Sync & Hash Check utility
items.description: Compares local folders to remote shares by hashing files concurrently, resolving speed issues in local deployment synchronizations.

items.title: Bamboo Specs YAML Boilerplate
items.description: A standard YAML template for structuring multistage builds with Docker agents, SonarQube tests, and Artifactory releases.

items.title: Multi-stage Dockerfile for Python services
items.description: Optimized multi-stage Dockerfile that drops privileges to a non-root user and compiles assets in a separate build container.

items.title: Standard ADR (Architecture Decision Record) Markdown template
items.description: A ready-to-use template for documenting architecture choices in markdown alongside software code repositories.
